title: Streamgraph — bands flow over time
blurb: Six bands stacked into a river around a wandering wiggle baseline — a LIVE streamgraph whose band thicknesses evolve every frame: each timestep's stacked silhouette is re-tessellated to gradient-filled ribbons (triGradient@1) and replayed as an UPDATE_RANGE that overwrites the vertex buffer in place, so the river flows and the silhouette undulates over time.
